problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of CRISPR. CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
